dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6331 IH: Addressing Dangerous Vulnerabilities in Exports and Research to Strategic Adversaries, Regimes, and Industrial Entities of Security Concern Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Miller of Ohio (for himself, Mr. Shreve, Mr. McCaul, and Mr. Moylan) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Foreign Affairs

form.official-title: To modify certain definitions under the Export Control Reform Act of 2018.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Addressing Dangerous Vulnerabilities in Exports and Research to Strategic Adversaries, Regimes, and Industrial Entities of Security Concern Act or the ADVERSARIES Act.

section.header: Modification to definitions under the Export Control Reform Act of 2018
section.text: Section 1742 of the Export Control Reform Act of 2018 (50 U.S.C. 4801) is amended—

subparagraph.text: by striking means— and all that follows through (A) any natural person and inserting the following:
by adding or at the end of clause (i) (as so designated);
by striking (B) any corporation and inserting the following:
by striking the period at the end of clause (ii) (as so designated) and inserting ; or; and
by adding at the end the following:

clause.text: each entity identified pursuant to section 1260H(a) of the William M. (Mac) Thornberry National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2021 (10 U.S.C. 113 note) to be a Chinese military company;

each entity identified pursuant to Supplement No. 4 to part 744 of title 15, Code of Federal Regulations, or successor regulations by the Bureau of Industry and Security of the Department of Commerce;

each entity identified pursuant to Supplement No. 7 to part 744 of title 15, Code of Federal Regulations, or successor regulations by the Bureau of Industry and Security of the Department of Commerce;
each subsidiary or affiliate of an entity that is owned 50 percent or more in the aggregate, directly or indirectly, by an entity described in clause (i), (ii), or (iii), wherever located.
